details.description: The percentage of offline agents in the Production Linux Agent Pool has exceeded the threshold of 50%.
potentialImpacts: Build and deployment pipelines may experience delays or failures due to insufficient available agents.
Critical workloads may be impacted, leading to potential SLA breaches.
recommendedActions: Investigate the cause of offline agents (e.g., hardware issues, network problems, maintenance).
Consider adding more agents to the pool or redistributing workloads to other pools if possible.
Monitor the situation closely and set up additional alerts if necessary.
